EN-ES Printable Resource

Bilingual Classroom Area Labels, Routines & Rules (K-2)

A set of bilingual (English-Spanish) labels for common classroom areas, essential visual routine cards, and classroom rules, designed for Kindergarten to 2nd-grade students, particularly supporting English Language Learners (ELLs).

TopicClassroom Areas
Age BandK-2
Pack Typeclassroom labels
LanguageEN-ES

✨ What's Inside

  • 10 classroom labels
  • 5 routine cards
  • 4 classroom rules
  • Teacher notes & answer key

📖 How to Use

Print and laminate all labels, routine cards, and rules for durability. Place full-size area labels prominently on walls or doors of designated zones. Use routine cards on a visible schedule board, reviewing them daily. Display classroom rules in a central location and refer to them regularly during class discussions.

LanternELLTeacher Notes📎 Sample

Teacher Notes

🎯 Objective

To create a language-rich and organized classroom environment that supports K-2 ELLs in understanding classroom areas, daily routines, and behavioral expectations through visual and bilingual aids.

💡 Suggested Use

Print and laminate all labels, routine cards, and rules for durability. Place full-size area labels prominently on walls or doors of designated zones. Use routine cards on a visible schedule board, reviewing them daily. Display classroom rules in a central location and refer to them regularly during class discussions.

📦 Materials Needed

  • Printer
  • Cardstock or heavy paper
  • Laminator and laminating pouches
  • Scissors
  • Tape, sticky tack, or velcro dots for display

🔀 Differentiation Tips

  • For newcomers, pair labels with realia or gestures when introducing them.
  • Encourage students to echo the English and Spanish words for each label.
  • Have students help place labels in the correct areas as a collaborative activity.
  • Use routine cards to sequence events before they happen, giving students a visual preview.
  • Incorporate the rules into role-playing scenarios to demonstrate appropriate behavior.
📄 Terms of Use — personal-classroom-use
✅ Print for your students & classroom use.❌ Do not share, redistribute, or resell files.🏫 School license: support@lanternell.com
